nasb.text: At the beginning of their living there, they did not fear the Lord; therefore the Lord sent lions among them which killed some of them.

esv.text: And at the beginning of their dwelling there, they did not fear the Lord. Therefore the Lord sent lions among them, which killed some of them.

cnv.text: 他們開始在那裡居住的時候，並不敬畏耶和華，所以耶和華派獅子到他們中間，咬死他們好些人。

ccb.text: 刚迁居到那里的时候，他们不敬拜耶和华，所以耶和华差遣狮子闯入他们当中，咬死了一些人。
